name: UBA : Possible SMB Session Enumeration on a Domain Controller
notes: Detects attempts at SMB enumeration against a domain controller.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when the event QID is one of the following (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
when the event matches Share Name (custom) contains any of [IPC or ADMIN]
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controllers - IP
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controllers - IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Possible SMB Session Enumeration on a Domain Controller on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001108) Success Audit: A network share object was accessed
AND when the event matches Share Name (custom) contains any of [IPC or ADMIN]
AND NOT when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controller Administrators - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND NOT when any of Source IP are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controllers - IP
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of UBA : Domain Controllers - IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Possible SMB Session Enumeration on a Domain Controller
